app.name: JaundiCare
app.support: Beta support for mama and newborn pikin
topbar.subtitle: Care for newborn pikin jaundice
dashboard.hero_tag: Quick support for mama and newborn babies
dashboard.hero_title: Check early. Do something early. No fear.
dashboard.hero_text: JaundiCare dey help parents see newborn jaundice early, understand the danger signs, and know when to monitor, recheck, or go hospital dat same day.
dashboard.create_profile_hint: Create profile so app go fit calculate pikin age by imself.
dashboard.check.1: Look the white part of the eyes.
dashboard.check.3: Check the palms and leg under.
dashboard.check.4: Watch how the pikin dey suck and how e active well well.
dashboard.warning.1: E dey hard to wake for food
dashboard.warning.3: Pikin body too weak or e just dey sleep too much
dashboard.warning.4: Urine wey dark or pikin shit wey white
profile.title: Pikin profile
profile.text: Save your pikin details once. De app go use am calculate age automatically for check-up.
profile.gestational_age: How many weeks the belle reach
screening.title: Pikin check-up form
screening.text: If you save pikin profile, we go fill the age automatically.
screening.age_helper: App fit fill this one from the pikin profile wey you save.
screening.state_helper: We go use this one if we no fit see your location.
screening.image_helper: Use light from outside if e possible. Focus for the face and eyes.
signs.difficult_to_wake: E dey hard to wake for food
signs.floppy: Pikin body weak or e just dey sleep too much
signs.first24h: Yellow colour start for de first 24 hours
signs.spreading: Yellow colour dey spread for de body
signs.yellow_eyes: The white part of the eyes dey yellow
signs.yellow_gums: Yellow colour for the gums inside mouth
signs.pale_stool: Pikin shit wey white or pale
result.title: Check-up result
result.empty: Send the form to see result.
history.title: Check-up history
education.title: Learning
care.title: Care Guide
common.location_unavailable: We no fit see your location. You fit enter your state by yourself.
common.request_failed: We no fit complete de check-up request.
next.urgent.1: Carry pikin go hospital or emergency center now now.
next.urgent.2: Try dey feed the pikin as you dey go hospital.
next.urgent.3: No waste time if pikin no gree wake, im body weak, or e no gree suck.
next.same_day.1: See doctor, midwife or health worker today today.
next.same_day.2: Continue to dey feed the pikin well.
next.same_day.3: Monitor de eyes, gums, palms, and leg under as you dey wait.
next.recheck.1: Recheck de pikin soon, use light from outside.
next.recheck.2: Watch for yellow eyes, if e no gree suck, or if e dey sleep too much.
next.recheck.3: Ask health worker for advice today if you still dey fear.
next.monitor.1: Continue to dey feed the pikin well.
next.monitor.2: Check de eyes, gums, palms, and how active the pikin be.
next.monitor.3: Find help if pikin start to sleep too much or im body yellow more.
edu.what_is.title: Wetin be Jaundice?
edu.what_is.body: Jaundice dey happen when too much 'bilirubin' dey inside pikin body. E fit make eyes, gums, skin, and palms yellow.
edu.check.title: How to check your pikin
edu.check.1: Look the white part of the eyes.
edu.check.3: Check de palms and under de leg.
edu.check.4: Watch how pikin dey suck and if e active.
edu.dark_skin.title: How to see jaundice for Black and Brown babies
edu.dark_skin.body: Jaundice fit hard to see for skin wey dark. Check de eyes, gums, palms, and under leg. Watch how pikin dey suck and sleep.
edu.what_to_do.title: Wetin parents go do
edu.what_to_do.2: Watch pikin well for the first few days after birth.
edu.what_to_do.3: Use this screening tool when you dey worry.
edu.what_to_do.4: Go hospital today today if you see danger signs.
edu.what_not_to_do.title: Wetin you no go do
edu.what_not_to_do.1: No ignore if pikin no gree suck or e dey sleep too much.
edu.what_not_to_do.2: No waste time to go hospital.
edu.what_not_to_do.3: No use only sun take treat jaundice.
edu.what_not_to_do.4: No assume say jaundice no fit cause wahala.
edu.urgent.title: When you need help fast fast
edu.urgent.1: Yellow colour for the first 24 hours
edu.urgent.2: E dey hard to wake pikin
care.feeding.title: Feeding support
care.feeding.body: When pikin dey suck well, e dey help remove bilirubin from de body.
care.feeding.2: Watch if pikin dey suck well
care.feeding.3: Find help early if pikin no gree suck
care.mother.title: Wetin mama fit do
care.mother.1: Look pikin well every time you dey feed am
care.mother.2: Check eyes and gums for good light
care.mother.3: Ask for help early if something no clear you
care.mother.4: Go for follow-up for hospital after dem discharge you
care.maternal.title: Support for mama after born
care.maternal.body: Mamas sef need care to recover well. Our goal na to help you find problem early so you no go over stay for hospital.
care.nutrition.title: Food matters for mama
care.nutrition.2: Dey chop beta food every time
care.nutrition.3: No skip food as you dey breastfeed
care.nutrition.4: Rest well and ask for help
chw.title: Community Care Mode
chw.intro: How health workers for community fit help parents check jaundice and give advice.
chw.actions.title: Quick actions
chw.followup.title: Checklist for after born
chw.followup.day1: Day 1: Check food, how pikin active, urine and shit.
chw.followup.day2: Day 2–3: Check eyes, gums, and palms for yellow colour.
chw.followup.day7: Day 7: Check food, weight, and yellow colour.
chw.followup.day14: Day 14: Send am go hospital if jaundice still dey.
chw.referral.title: How to go hospital
chw.risk.title: Wetin health workers must check first
chw.risk.1: Jaundice for inside the first 24 hours.
chw.risk.2: Pikin no gree suck plus yellow colour.
chw.risk.3: Hard to wake, weak body, dark urine.
chw.risk.4: Darker skin babies wey yellow fit hard to see.
chw.alignment.title: Community support for newborn
chw.alignment.body: E dey for parents and health workers to monitor pikin early.
reminder.title: Follow-up reminders
reminder.text: Reminders for pikin follow-up based on age and jaundice risk.
reminder.empty: Create pikin profile to see reminders.
reminder.day14: Day 14: Go hospital if jaundice still dey.
voice.title: Voice guide
voice.text: Listen to simple jaundice advice for parents.
voice.unsupported: Your browser no support voice guide.
voice.script: Newborn jaundice fit cause wahala if you no see am early. Check your pikin eyes, gums, palms and under leg if e yellow. Watch how e dey suck and if e active. If pikin no gree wake, body weak, or e yellow for de first 24 hours, carry am go hospital now now.
trust.title: This na only support tool.
trust.body: E no be doctor, midwife, or health worker, and e no replace bilirubin test.
parent.message.urgent: Carry your pikin go hospital now now. No wait at all. This result need urgent doctor help today today.
parent.message.same_day: Doctor or health worker suppose see your pikin today. Abeg no wait reach tomorrow.
parent.message.monitor: Your pikin look okay for now. Keep feeding am well, watch if im eyes or skin yellow, and check am again if anything change.
